commit.message:
LU-0000 tests: check sanity/44f w/o debugging

with default (all) debugging it takes ~1000+s easily

Test-Parameters: trivial env=ONLY=44 testlist=sanity
Signed-off-by: Alex Zhuravlev <bzzz@whamcloud.com>
